reporting_unit: Filing reports in USD millions (decimals=-6, scale=6 per XBRL). All monetary values multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw USD. Shares reported in millions and multiplied by 1,000,000 to convert to raw count.

company_mapping.revenue: us-gaap:Revenues — line item labeled Revenue on income statement. NVDA reports a single revenue line with no sub-segments on the face of the IS.
company_mapping.cogs: us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — line item labeled Cost of revenue on income statement.
company_mapping.gross_profit: us-gaap:GrossProfit — explicitly reported as Gross profit on income statement.
company_mapping.operating_income: us-gaap:OperatingIncomeLoss — line item labeled Operating income on income statement.
company_mapping.income_tax_expense: us-gaap:IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit — labeled Income tax expense on income statement.
company_mapping.net_income: us-gaap:NetIncomeLoss — labeled Net income on both income statement and cash flow statement (confirmed matching). NVDA has no noncontrolling interest; consolidated net income equals parent net income.
company_mapping.interest_expense: us-gaap:InterestExpenseNonoperating — labeled Interest expense on income statement. This is gross interest expense as NVDA separately discloses Interest income. Reported as positive in filing; normalized to negative per convention.
company_mapping.sbc: us-gaap:ShareBasedCompensation — labeled Stock-based compensation expense in operating activities section of cash flow statement.
company_mapping.dna: us-gaap:DepreciationDepletionAndAmortization — labeled Depreciation and amortization in operating activities section of cash flow statement. Single line covers all D&A components.
company_mapping.diluted_shares: us-gaap:WeightedAverageNumberOfDilutedSharesOutstanding — labeled Diluted weighted average shares on income statement. Reported in millions; converted to raw count.
company_mapping.cash: us-gaap:CashAndCashEquivalentsAtCarryingValue — labeled Cash and cash equivalents on balance sheet.
company_mapping.short_term_investments: nvda:MarketableSecuritiesAndEquitySecuritiesFVNI — labeled Marketable securities on balance sheet. NVDA combines marketable debt securities and equity securities FV-NI into this custom concept. This is the current-asset short-term investment balance.
company_mapping.accounts_receivable: us-gaap:AccountsReceivableNetCurrent — labeled Accounts receivable, net on balance sheet. Pure trade AR.
company_mapping.inventory: us-gaap:InventoryNet — labeled Inventories on balance sheet.
company_mapping.accounts_payable: us-gaap:AccountsPayableCurrent — labeled Accounts payable on balance sheet. Reported separately from accrued liabilities; no breakout needed.
company_mapping.total_assets: us-gaap:Assets — labeled Total assets on balance sheet.
company_mapping.equity: us-gaap:StockholdersEquity — labeled Total shareholders equity on balance sheet. NVDA has no noncontrolling interest.
company_mapping.short_term_debt: us-gaap:DebtCurrent (= us-gaap:LongTermDebtCurrent per notes) — labeled Short-term debt on balance sheet. Represents current portion of long-term debt. Value is 999M for Jan 25 2026 and 0 for Jan 26 2025.
company_mapping.long_term_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebtNoncurrent — labeled Long-term debt on balance sheet.
company_mapping.operating_lease_liabilities: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiability (total) from XBRL notes = current (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent = 372M) + non-current (us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent = 2,572M) = 2,944M for Jan 25 2026. Note: current operating lease liability is embedded within AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent on the balance sheet face per extensible list disclosure. Non-current is shown separately as Long-term operating lease liabilities. Prior year (Jan 26 2025): only non-current 1,519M is on face; current portion for prior year not disclosed in XBRL not-on-statement — use total from OperatingLeaseLiability concept where available; for Jan 26 2025 only noncurrent 1,519M is available so total operating lease liability for prior year = 1,519M (current portion not separately disclosed in XBRL for that date).
company_mapping.cfo: us-gaap:NetCashProvidedByUsedInOperatingActivities — labeled Net cash provided by operating activities on cash flow statement.
company_mapping.capex: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireProductiveAssets — labeled Purchases related to property and equipment and intangible assets on cash flow statement. NVDA bundles PP&E and intangible asset purchases into one line. Reported as positive outflow; normalized to negative per convention.
company_mapping.acquisitions: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessesNetOfCashAcquired — labeled Acquisitions, net of cash acquired on cash flow statement. Note: there is also us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessTwoNetOfCashAcquired labeled Groq Inc. = 13,000M for FY2026 which is a separate acquisition line. Total acquisitions = 1,535M + 13,000M = 14,535M for FY2026. Normalized to negative.
company_mapping.rd_expense: us-gaap:ResearchAndDevelopmentExpense — labeled Research and development on income statement.
company_mapping.interest_income: us-gaap:InvestmentIncomeInterest — labeled Interest income on income statement. Used for unlevered FCF and interest coverage context.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_interest: Not separately disclosed as a supplemental cash flow item in the extraction. The supplemental section only shows IncomeTaxesPaidNet. For Metric 21, use income statement interest expense as approximation.
company_mapping.current_operating_lease_liability: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityCurrent = 372M for Jan 25 2026 (from XBRL not-on-statement, embedded in AccruedLiabilitiesCurrent). Not available for Jan 26 2025 in XBRL data.
company_mapping.noncurrent_operating_lease_liability: us-gaap:OperatingLeaseLiabilityNoncurrent — labeled Long-term operating lease liabilities on balance sheet face.
company_mapping.inventory_raw_materials: us-gaap:InventoryRawMaterialsNetOfReserves — from XBRL not-on-statement balance sheet note.
company_mapping.inventory_wip: us-gaap:InventoryWorkInProcessNetOfReserves — from XBRL not-on-statement balance sheet note.
company_mapping.inventory_finished_goods: us-gaap:InventoryFinishedGoodsNetOfReserves — from XBRL not-on-statement balance sheet note.
company_mapping.total_gross_debt: us-gaap:LongTermDebt (total before split) = 8,468M for Jan 26 2026 per notes. Split into current 999M + noncurrent 7,469M.
company_mapping.gains_on_equity_securities: us-gaap:GainLossOnInvestments — Gains on non-marketable and publicly-held equity securities subtracted in CFO reconciliation.
company_mapping.groq_acquisition: us-gaap:PaymentsToAcquireBusinessTwoNetOfCashAcquired — Groq Inc. acquisition labeled separately in investing activities = 13,000M FY2026.
company_mapping.segment_revenue_compute_networking: Compute and Networking segment revenue per StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.segment_operating_income_compute_network: Compute and Networking segment operating income per StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.segment_operating_income_graphics: Graphics segment operating income per StatementBusinessSegmentsAxis.
company_mapping.revenue_data_center: Data Center end market revenue per ProductOrServiceAxis.
company_mapping.revenue_gaming: Gaming end market revenue per ProductOrServiceAxis.
company_mapping.revenue_professional_visualization: Professional Visualization end market revenue per ProductOrServiceAxis.
company_mapping.revenue_automotive: Automotive end market revenue per ProductOrServiceAxis.
company_mapping.revenue_oem_other: OEM and Other end market revenue per ProductOrServiceAxis.
company_mapping.cash_paid_for_taxes_net: us-gaap:IncomeTaxesPaidNet — supplemental disclosure in cash flow statement.
